title: Christopher Luxon meets with with China's Xi Jinping
description: The Prime Minister has been warmly welcomed by China's leader.
keywords: Radio New Zealand, RNZ, Public Radio, News, Current Affairs, Audio, Podcasts
snippet:
Photo: Pool / Chris Skelton

Christopher Luxon has been warmly welcomed by China's President in Lima on the sidelines of the APEC Summit.
